query:
UPDATE host_listings SET 
overseasExperience = 'I''m a true Shanghai local - my expertise comes from cooking for my family every day and hosting relatives during holidays, not from traveling abroad.',
funFacts = 'This would be my first time hosting international guests! I cook for my family every day and love sharing typical Chinese home-style food.',
whyHost = 'I''d love to open my home and share a real family-style Chinese meal with international guests, along with everyday stories about life in Shanghai.',
culturalPassions = 'I''m passionate about simple, comforting home-style Chinese cooking - the kind meant to be shared with family and friends around the table.'
WHERE id = 210001;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute UPDATE host_listings SET 
overseasExperience = 'I''m a true Shanghai local - my expertise comes from cooking for my family every day and hosting relatives during holidays, not from traveling abroad.',
funFacts = 'This would be my first time hosting international guests! I cook for my family every day and love sharing typical Chinese home-style food.',
whyHost = 'I''d love to open my home and share a real family-style Chinese meal with international guests, along with everyday stories about life in Shanghai.',
culturalPassions = 'I''m passionate about simple, comforting home-style Chinese cooking - the kind meant to be shared with family and friends around the table.'
WHERE id = 210001;
